title: Lead Investment Banker at Star Health Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Star Health Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
